candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total.
Also a valid revenue line, but appears to be a duplicate total of Revenues.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Interest income, not sales/revenue.
Tax expense, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the year
candidates.why: Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income metric, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Incl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income metric, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Minority comprehensive income, not revenue.
Comprehensive income, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list; both lines are valid top-line labels, with Revenues preferred over the duplicate total.

candidates.why: Closest direct production cost line on the income statement.
Balance sheet inventory asset, not an expense.

variables.notes: Selected the direct production cost expense line. The inventory change line exists but was not included because COGS is best mapped to the primary direct cost row from the candidate set.

candidates.why: Overhead component; personnel costs are classic SG&A components.
Broad operating overhead bucket; useful especially where explicit SG&A is sparse.
Explicit SG&A label; per rules should be included even if preview values are empty, and paired with a broader overhead bucket if mostly empty.
Subcomponent/older-period bucket within other operating expenses.
R&D row exists but is supplemental and below EBIT, so not ideal for SG&A inclusion under the placement rule.

candidates.row_label: Acc Amort Brand/ Patents/ Trademarks/ Marketing/ Artistic Intang
candidates.why: Balance sheet accumulated amortization, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists but appears mostly empty in the preview, so per rule included that row plus the closest broad overhead bucket for coverage across years. Excluded totals/subtotals and excluded R&D because the only R&D row appears below EBIT in the supplemental section.

candidates.why: Only dedicated R&D line available; labeled supplemental and appears below EBIT, but still the best R&D mapping.

variables.notes: Mapped to the dedicated R&D line. It appears in the supplemental section below EBIT, so it was not also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Broad total finance cost line, but granular recurring interest components are available and preferred.
Direct recurring interest expense component.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring lease-interest component; should be added to interest expense.
Too broad/ambiguous and may include non-interest items; less preferred than direct interest rows.
Empty/ambiguous heading, not preferred.
Not a finance cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of the lease-interest row; avoid double counting.
Balance sheet derivative-related label, not recurring interest expense.
Balance sheet payable, not income statement expense.
Liability balance, not expense.
Liability balance, not expense.
Explicitly interest-free; not interest expense.
Equity item, not interest expense.
Equity item, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used the most granular recurring interest components and avoided the broader Finance costs total to prevent double counting with FX, derivatives, and other finance items.

candidates.row_label: Impairment of Equity Investments and Loan
candidates.why: Income statement impairment line, not equity.
Income statement attribution of profit, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Income statement OCI attribution, not equity balance.
Audit fee, not equity.
Asset/receivable, not equity.
Liability, not equity.
Only a component of equity, not full book equity.
Owner/parent equity line excluding non-controlling interests; ideal for BE.
Valid only if no owner/parent equity line exists; here less preferred because it includes NCI.

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity line, which excludes non-controlling interests and therefore avoids double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit, not balance sheet NCI balance.
Direct balance sheet NCI line; preferred.
Equivalent balance sheet label and appears duplicated with same values; good backup.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not balance sheet NCI balance.

variables.notes: Using balance sheet NCI labels as a priority list; both appear to be duplicate representations of the minority interest balance.
